StatusVariables.Name: MeasuredWaferTemperature
StatusVariables.Description: Current temperature of the wafer measured by the tool

StatusVariables.Name: ArcCurrent
StatusVariables.Description: Current flowing through the arc chamber

StatusVariables.Name: ArcVoltage
StatusVariables.Description: Voltage applied to the arc chamber

StatusVariables.Name: FilamentOperationalHours
StatusVariables.Description: Total operational hours of the tungsten filament

StatusVariables.Name: CoolantFlowRate
StatusVariables.Description: Backside helium coolant flow rate

StatusVariables.Name: CoolantPressure
StatusVariables.Description: Backside helium coolant pressure

StatusVariables.Name: SystemStatus
StatusVariables.Description: Overall status: IDLE, IMPLANTING, TUNING, FAULT, MAINTENANCE

StatusVariables.Name: ControlState
StatusVariables.Description: GEM control state: 1=OFF-LINE, 2=ATTEMPT ONLINE, 3=HOST, 4=EQUIPMENT, 5=ON-LINE

StatusVariables.Name: ProcessState
StatusVariables.Description: Current equipment process state from the state machine

StatusVariables.Name: PreviousProcessState
StatusVariables.Description: Previous process state (set at each transition)

StatusVariables.Name: EquipmentTime
StatusVariables.Description: Equipment real-time clock YYYYMMDDHHmmss

StatusVariables.Name: ActiveWaferCount
StatusVariables.Description: Equipment wafer count does not match host tracking

StatusVariables.Name: MaintenanceMode
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = maintenance mode active, processing inhibited

StatusVariables.Name: RadiationInterlock
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = X-ray radiation level exceeds safe threshold

StatusVariables.Name: DoorInterlock_Source
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = ion source access panel is open

StatusVariables.Name: DoorInterlock_Beamline
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = beamline access panel is open

StatusVariables.Name: DoorInterlock_EndStation
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = end station access door is open

StatusVariables.Name: PMCounter_Source
StatusVariables.Description: Ion source operating hours since last filament replacement

StatusVariables.Name: PMCounter_Beamline
StatusVariables.Description: Beamline operating hours since last PM

StatusVariables.Name: Source_ArcCurrentSetpoint
StatusVariables.Description: Active recipe arc current setpoint (R/W)

StatusVariables.Name: Source_FilamentCurrent
StatusVariables.Description: Filament current to maintain arc

StatusVariables.Name: Source_FilamentVoltage
StatusVariables.Description: Filament heating voltage

StatusVariables.Name: Source_GasFlow
StatusVariables.Description: MFC actual flow rate for source gas

StatusVariables.Name: Source_GasFlowSetpoint
StatusVariables.Description: Source gas flow actual value

StatusVariables.Name: Source_GasSpecies
StatusVariables.Description: Active source gas: BF3, PH3, AsH3, Ar, Xe

StatusVariables.Name: Source_ExtractionVoltage
StatusVariables.Description: Extraction electrode voltage

StatusVariables.Name: Source_ExtractionCurrent
StatusVariables.Description: Extraction beam current at source exit

StatusVariables.Name: Source_Status
StatusVariables.Description: Source state: OFF, WARMING_UP, PLASMA_ON, STABLE, FAULT

StatusVariables.Name: Source_VaporiserTemp
StatusVariables.Description: Vaporiser temperature for solid source materials (e.g., Decaborane)

StatusVariables.Name: Source_ChamberPressure
StatusVariables.Description: Ion source chamber internal pressure

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_AnalyzerMagnetCurrent
StatusVariables.Description: Analyzer magnet coil current

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_AnalyzerMagnetSetpoint
StatusVariables.Description: Analyzer magnet current setpoint for selected species/energy

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_ResolvedCurrent
StatusVariables.Description: Beam current at the resolving aperture Faraday cup

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_Energy
StatusVariables.Description: Actual measured beam energy

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_EnergySetpoint
StatusVariables.Description: Recipe-specified beam energy setpoint

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_AccelVoltage
StatusVariables.Description: Acceleration column voltage

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_DecelVoltage
StatusVariables.Description: Deceleration electrode voltage (for energy contamination control)

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_ScanFreqX
StatusVariables.Description: X-axis electrostatic scan frequency

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_ScanFreqY
StatusVariables.Description: Y-axis mechanical scan frequency

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_ScanAmplitudeX
StatusVariables.Description: X-axis scan amplitude at wafer plane

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_ScanAmplitudeY
StatusVariables.Description: Y-axis scan amplitude at wafer plane

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_SpotSizeX
StatusVariables.Description: Beam spot width at wafer plane (X)

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_SpotSizeY
StatusVariables.Description: Beam spot height at wafer plane (Y)

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_Parallelism
StatusVariables.Description: Beam angle deviation from parallel (should be < 0.5°)

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_Status
StatusVariables.Description: Beamline state: OFF, TUNING, BEAM_ON, STABLE, FAULT

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_PlatenTilt
StatusVariables.Description: Wafer platen tilt angle (relative to beam)

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_PlatenTiltSetpoint
StatusVariables.Description: Platen tilt angle actual value

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_PlatenTwist
StatusVariables.Description: Platen twist angle setpoint

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_PlatenTwistSetpoint
StatusVariables.Description: Platen twist angle actual value

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_DoseCurrent
StatusVariables.Description: Instantaneous dose Faraday cup current

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_DoseAccumulated
StatusVariables.Description: Accumulated dose delivered to current wafer

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_DoseTarget
StatusVariables.Description: Dose tracking actual profile

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_DoseUniformity
StatusVariables.Description: Real-time dose uniformity (1-sigma)

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_WaferPresent
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = wafer detected on platen

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_WaferClamped
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = electrostatic clamp engaged

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_ImplantTime
StatusVariables.Description: Elapsed implant time for current wafer

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_ProcessState
StatusVariables.Description: End station sub-state: IDLE, LOADING, ALIGNING, IMPLANTING, UNLOADING, FAULT

StatusVariables.Name: WH_RobotStatus
StatusVariables.Description: Robot state: IDLE, TRANSFERRING, ALIGNING, FAULT, TEACHING

StatusVariables.Name: WH_RobotPosition
StatusVariables.Description: Robot position: HOME, LOADPORT1, LOADPORT2, LOADLOCK, PREALIGNER, ENDSTATION

StatusVariables.Name: WH_LoadPort1_Status
StatusVariables.Description: Port 1: EMPTY, FOUP_PRESENT, MAPPING, READY, FAULT

StatusVariables.Name: WH_LoadPort2_Status
StatusVariables.Description: Port 2: EMPTY, FOUP_PRESENT, MAPPING, READY, FAULT

StatusVariables.Name: WH_LoadLock_State
StatusVariables.Description: Load lock: VENTED, PUMPING, VACUUM, VENTING, FAULT

StatusVariables.Name: WH_LoadLock_Pressure
StatusVariables.Description: Load lock chamber pressure

StatusVariables.Name: WH_PrealignAngle
StatusVariables.Description: Notch finder measured wafer orientation angle

StatusVariables.Name: WH_WaferInLoadLock
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = wafer present in load lock

StatusVariables.Name: WH_FOUP1_WaferCount
StatusVariables.Description: Number of wafers detected in FOUP on port 1

StatusVariables.Name: WH_FOUP2_WaferCount
StatusVariables.Description: Number of wafers detected in FOUP on port 2

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_Beamline_Pressure
StatusVariables.Description: Beamline section vacuum pressure (ion gauge)

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_EndStation_Pressure
StatusVariables.Description: End station process chamber vacuum pressure

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_SourceChamber_Pressure
StatusVariables.Description: Ion source region vacuum pressure

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_TurboPump1_Speed
StatusVariables.Description: Beamline turbomolecular pump rotor speed

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_TurboPump1_Status
StatusVariables.Description: OFF, STARTING, RUNNING, FAULT

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_TurboPump2_Speed
StatusVariables.Description: End station turbomolecular pump rotor speed

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_TurboPump2_Status
StatusVariables.Description: OFF, STARTING, RUNNING, FAULT

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_CryoPump_Temp
StatusVariables.Description: Cryopump cold head temp > 18 K — performance degraded

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_CryoPump_Status
StatusVariables.Description: OFF, COOLDOWN, RUNNING, REGENERATING, FAULT

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_RoughingPump_Status
StatusVariables.Description: Dry scroll pump: OFF, RUNNING, FAULT

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_GateValve_BL
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = beamline gate valve OPEN

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_GateValve_ES
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = end station gate valve OPEN

StatusVariables.Name: HV_TerminalVoltage
StatusVariables.Description: Terminal high-voltage supply output

StatusVariables.Name: HV_TerminalCurrent
StatusVariables.Description: Terminal high-voltage supply current

StatusVariables.Name: HV_TerminalSetpoint
StatusVariables.Description: Terminal voltage setpoint

StatusVariables.Name: HV_TerminalStatus
StatusVariables.Description: OFF, RAMPING, ON, FAULT

StatusVariables.Name: HV_SuppressionVoltage
StatusVariables.Description: Electron suppression electrode voltage

StatusVariables.Name: HV_ExtractionVoltage
StatusVariables.Description: Extraction electrode voltage (same as Source_ExtractionVoltage)

StatusVariables.Name: HV_InterlockStatus
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = all HV interlocks satisfied (safe to energise)

StatusVariables.Name: PSU_24V_Status
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = 24V instrument power supply OK

StatusVariables.Name: PSU_48V_Status
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = 48V servo power supply OK

StatusVariables.Name: PSU_MainAC_Status
StatusVariables.Description: TRUE = main 3-phase AC power within tolerance

StatusVariables.Name: Source_ArcFault
StatusVariables.Description: Arc current or voltage outside safe operating range — source off

StatusVariables.Name: Source_GasLeak
StatusVariables.Description: Toxic gas leak detected near ion source (AsH₃ or PH₃)

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_EnergyContamination
StatusVariables.Description: Energy contamination exceeds 1% — incorrect dopant depth

StatusVariables.Name: Beam_OverCurrent
StatusVariables.Description: Beam current exceeds safe limit for wafer damage

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_DoseOverrun
StatusVariables.Description: Delivered dose exceeds target by > 5% — wafer damage risk

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_WaferOverheat
StatusVariables.Description: Wafer temperature exceeds 120°C — photoresist degradation

StatusVariables.Name: EndStn_WaferDrop
StatusVariables.Description: Wafer detected off-platen during transfer

StatusVariables.Name: HV_ArcOver
StatusVariables.Description: HV arc-over detected in acceleration column — HV tripped

StatusVariables.Name: HV_InterlockFail
StatusVariables.Description: HV interlock not satisfied but beam requested

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_BeamlineLeak
StatusVariables.Description: Beamline pressure rise rate exceeds acceptable limit

StatusVariables.Name: Vac_EndStationLeak
StatusVariables.Description: End station pressure rise rate exceeds acceptable limit

StatusVariables.Name: Robot_CollisionFault
StatusVariables.Description: Robot collision or obstruction detected during transfer

StatusVariables.Name: Robot_WaferDrop
StatusVariables.Description: Wafer drop sensor activated during transfer

StatusVariables.Name: EMO_Activated
StatusVariables.Description: Emergency Master Off pressed — all systems halted

StatusVariables.Name: Radiation_Exceeded
StatusVariables.Description: X-ray radiation level exceeds personnel safety threshold

StatusVariables.Name: PowerFault_MainAC
StatusVariables.Description: Main AC power phase loss or out of tolerance

StatusVariables.Name: DoseUniformity_Actual
StatusVariables.Description: Post-implant dose uniformity actual value

StatusVariables.Name: DoseUniformity_RecipeLimit
StatusVariables.Description: Post-implant dose uniformity recipe limit

Events.Description: Tool aborts the implant process due to an error condition
Beam turned on and scanning wafer
Target dose reached or process completed
Beam current dropped below minimum threshold
Wafer placed on end station platen
Wafer removed from end station platen
FOUP placed and mapped on Load Port 1
FOUP placed and mapped on Load Port 2
Load lock vent to atmosphere started
FOUP slot mapping completed on Port 1
FOUP slot mapping completed on Port 2
New recipe loaded into active slot

Alarms.Description: Arc fault detected in the source chamber
Toxic gas leak detected in the gas box
Invalid command or cannot perform now

RemoteCommands.Description: Clears the current fault state and returns the tool to IDLE state
Begin implant run on specified wafer with loaded recipe
Immediately abort active implant, shut beam off
Pause implant; beam shutter closes, dose accumulation halted
Initiate beam tuning sequence for current recipe species/energy
Ignite ion source with specified gas species
Load recipe from library to active slot
Enter maintenance mode; inhibit all processing
Exit maintenance mode; return to normal operation
Reset PM counter for specified subsystem
Pump down the load lock to transfer vacuum

States.Name: IDLE
States.Description: Tool is idle and ready for operation

States.Name: FAULT
States.Description: Tool is in a fault state due to an error condition

States.Name: SETTING_UP
States.Description: Recipe loaded, beam tuning in progress, source warming up

States.Name: BEAM_READY
States.Description: Source on, beam tuned and stable, ready to accept wafer

States.Name: LOADING
States.Description: Wafer being transferred from load lock to platen

States.Name: ALIGNING
States.Description: Platen moving to recipe tilt/twist angles

States.Name: IMPLANTING
States.Description: Beam on, scanning wafer, dose accumulating

States.Name: UNLOADING
States.Description: Wafer being transferred from platen back to load lock

States.Name: COMPLETED
States.Description: Wafer implant complete, results available, wafer ready for unload

States.Name: MAINTENANCE
States.Description: Maintenance mode active; all processing inhibited

StateTransitions.TriggerEvent: Wafer handler begins transfer to end station
Tilt/twist at setpoint, clamp engaged, beam shutter opens
Robot begins wafer removal from platen
WaferUnloaded & no more wafers in lot; source/HV shut down
Source ignition failure or HV arc-over

Reports.Name: ImplantRecipeParameters
Reports.Reasoning: Grouping all recipe-related parameters (ID, version, lot, wafer, slot, species, energy, dose) for traceability.

Reports.Name: ImplantTargetParameters
Reports.Reasoning: Grouping target parameters (tilt, twist, beam current, dose uniformity, wafer temp, implant mode) for process setup.

Reports.Name: ImplantActualResults
Reports.Reasoning: Grouping actual implant results (dose, uniformity, energy, beam current, tilt, twist, duration, wafer temp) for post-process analysis.

Reports.Name: ImplantQualityMetrics
Reports.Reasoning: Grouping quality metrics (process result, abort reason, beam stability, dose accuracy, energy contamination, particle count) for yield analysis.

Reports.Name: ImplantStartContext
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3001 (ImplantStart). Includes platen tilt, dose current, recipe ID, wafer ID, target energy, and target dose.

Reports.Name: ImplantEndResults
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3002 (ImplantEnd). Includes actual dose, uniformity, energy, beam current, and process result.

Reports.Name: BeamTuneStartContext
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3004 (BeamTuneStart). Includes arc current, analyzer magnet current, and beam energy.

Reports.Name: BeamTuneCompleteResults
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3005 (BeamTuneComplete). Includes resolved current, beam energy, parallelism, and beam status.

Reports.Name: BeamLostContext
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3006 (BeamLost). Includes resolved current and beam status.

Reports.Name: SourceIgnitionContext
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3007 (SourceIgnition). Includes arc current, arc voltage, and source status.

Reports.Name: SourceExtinguishContext
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3008 (SourceExtinguish). Includes source status.

Reports.Name: SourceFaultContext
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3009 (SourceFault). Includes arc current, arc voltage, source status, and source operational data.

Reports.Name: WaferLoadedEndStationContext
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3010 (WaferLoaded_EndStation). Includes wafer present, wafer clamped, and wafer ID.

Reports.Name: WaferUnloadedEndStationContext
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3011 (WaferUnloaded_EndStation). Includes wafer present, wafer ID, and process result.

Reports.Name: WaferPrealignedContext
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3012 (WaferPrealigned). Includes prealign angle and wafer ID.

Reports.Name: FOUPLoadedPort1Context
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3013 (FOUPLoaded_Port1). Includes load port status and wafer count.

Reports.Name: FOUPUnloadedPort1Context
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3014 (FOUPUnloaded_Port1). Includes load port status.

Reports.Name: FOUPLoadedPort2Context
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3015 (FOUPLoaded_Port2). Includes load port status and wafer count.

Reports.Name: FOUPUnloadedPort2Context
Reports.Reasoning: Directly linked to CEID=3016 (FOUPUnloaded_Port2). Includes load port status.

Reports.Name: ImplantAbortContext
Reports.Reasoning: Grouping process result, abort reason, actual dose, and implant duration for CEID=3003 (ImplantAbort).

Reports.Name: SystemStatusOverview
Reports.Reasoning: Grouping system status, control state, process state, EMO status, maintenance mode, and radiation interlock for monitoring.

Reports.Name: SourceParameters
Reports.Reasoning: Grouping all source-related parameters (arc current, voltage, setpoints, gas flow, species, extraction voltage/current) for diagnostics.

Reports.Name: BeamParameters
Reports.Reasoning: Grouping all beam-related parameters (magnet current, energy, scan freq/amplitude, spot size, parallelism, status) for diagnostics.

Reports.Name: EndStationParameters
Reports.Reasoning: Grouping all end station parameters (platen tilt/twist, dose current/accumulated/target, wafer present/clamped, implant time, process state).

Reports.Name: VacuumSystemParameters
Reports.Reasoning: Grouping all vacuum system parameters (pressures, pump speeds/statuses, gate valves) for diagnostics.

Reports.Name: HighVoltageParameters
Reports.Reasoning: Grouping all high voltage parameters (terminal voltage/current/setpoint, suppression/extraction voltage, interlock status).

Reports.Name: AlarmStatus
Reports.Reasoning: Grouping all alarm-related status variables for fault monitoring.
